---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a product, UX, or engineering improvement
title: "[Feature] "
---

## Problem to solve / 要解决的问题

What user problem or workflow gap does this request address?

这个功能希望解决什么用户问题或流程空缺？

## Proposed idea / 你的想法

Describe the feature or change you want.

描述你希望增加或改变的内容。

## Why it matters / 为什么重要

Explain who benefits and why this is worth building.

说明它对谁有价值，以及为什么值得做。

## Scope notes / 范围备注

If relevant, mention whether this affects:

- candidate management
- target role setup
- search execution
- result review
- exports
- documentation

如果相关，请说明它更偏向上面的哪些范围。

## Additional context / 补充信息

Add references, screenshots, or examples if useful.

如有参考资料、截图或例子，可以补充在这里。
